name: 287(g) Enforcement Map
blurb: Tracking which Mississippi sheriffs deputized local officers for federal immigration enforcement.
description: An interactive county map tracking which Mississippi sheriffs signed 287(g) agreements with ICE — deputizing local officers to carry out federal immigration enforcement — and how the program spread across the state.
findings: Gave viewers a county-by-county view of where local law enforcement gained federal immigration powers, and documented how quickly the agreements multiplied.

name: Physician Accountability Dashboard
blurb: A searchable record of Mississippi medical board disciplinary actions.
description: A searchable dashboard built from scraped state medical board records, letting anyone look up a physician's history of findings, sanctions, and disciplinary actions in seconds.
findings: Surfaced doctors who kept practicing after serious disciplinary findings and powered reporting on gaps in how the state oversees its physicians.

name: Public Salary Explorer
blurb: A searchable index of state and local government salaries.
description: A searchable index of state and local government salaries, built from public payroll data, that makes it simple to compare pay across agencies and spot outliers.
findings: Powered reporting on outlier pay and runaway overtime across public payrolls.

name: Court Docket Tracker
blurb: A nightly scraper that flags long-pending court cases.
description: An automated pipeline that scrapes county court dockets every night, flagging long-pending cases and surfacing fresh leads for the courts beat.
findings: Turned thousands of raw docket entries into an early-warning system for stories on court delays and backlogs.
